title: DaGoofyPack
description: Goofy Ahh sound pack to bring your Minecraft experience to a cartoonish level
body:
This resource pack based on meme and cartoons is there to add goofyness to your Minecraft experience in a subtle way. From changing some of the block and mob sounds to the ambient music of certain biome, this sound pack will stay true to the vanilla experience while reminding you that life is just a meme.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/0JTJuUb8jT8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

The metal pipe replacing the anvil sound when placed and used is just one example among the many available in this sound pack.
